3. EFFECTIVE PRINCIPLES ("EP") OF (EFFECTIVE +   NAME OF SUBJECT )
 
i.e.,
Why does the Subject work effectively? Why does it not work effectively?
What are Effective Principles that enable the Subject to best align with its Ultimate Driving System or best overcome its Ultimate Blocking System?
How and why do the Effective Principles work? How and why can they fail to do so?

This is a detailed discussion on the 3 core values of effectiveness (i.e., sustainability, efficiency, and scalability), and their resulting effective principles (i.e., the "Effective Principles", or the "EP") that are relevant to the Subject. These Effective Principles govern the effectiveness of this Subject because they are based on the Ultimate Driving System or the Ultimate Blocking System of the Subject. The key questions in this topics are:
 
Basic Questions:
Why does the Subject work effectively? Why does it fail to work effectively?
What are the principles that enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System so that the Subject can become the effective one (i.e., the "Effective Principles" or the "EP")? What are these Effective Principles not?
How do the Effective Principles enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System (i.e., the "EP.Actions")? How can they possibly fail to do so?
What cause the Effective Principles to effectively enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System (i.e., the "EP.UD")? What may cause them to fail (i.e., the "EP.UB")?
Why does the Effective Principles effectively enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System? Why can it possibly fail to do so?
Advanced Questions: (To Study 1 Layer Deeper)
What are the governing principles that best enable the Effective Principles to become the effective one (i.e., the "EP.Principles")?
What is the environment that fully incorporate all the EP.Principles (i.e., the "EP.Environment")?
What is the set of tools that fully incorporate all the EP.Principles (i.e., the "EP.Tools")?
How can we best apply the Effective Principle System to achieve the desired effectiveness in this Subject (i.e., the "EP.Procedure")?

What else can we do when the EOE does not work?

ULTIMATE BLOCKING SYSTEM ("UBS") OF (EFFECTIVE + NAME OF SUBJECT ) i.e., • What ultimately (i.e., directly & mainly) determines the failure (i.e., the "Ultimate Blocking System" or the "UDS", and its components "Ultimate Blockers") of the Subject? • How does the Ultimate Blocking System of the Subject work? How can we best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System to achieve the desired effectiveness in this Subject (i.e., the "UBS.Procedure")?

3.0. OVERVIEW & SUMMARY OF THE SUBJECT'S EFFECTIVE EFFECTIVE PRINCIPLE SYSTEM ("EP", "EP.OUTCOMES" & "EP.ACTIONS") (Why Important? What is it? How does it work in general?)

3. EFFECTIVE PRINCIPLES ("EP") OF (EFFECTIVE + NAME OF SUBJECT ) i.e., Why does the Subject work effectively? Why does it not work effectively? What are Effective Principles that enable the Subject to best align with its Ultimate Driving System or best overcome its Ultimate Blocking System? How and why do the Effective Principles work? How and why can they fail to do so?

This is a detailed discussion on the 3 core values of effectiveness (i.e., sustainability, efficiency, and scalability), and their resulting effective principles (i.e., the "Effective Principles", or the "EP") that are relevant to the Subject. These Effective Principles govern the effectiveness of this Subject because they are based on the Ultimate Driving System or the Ultimate Blocking System of the Subject. The key questions in this topics are: Basic Questions: Why does the Subject work effectively? Why does it fail to work effectively? What are the principles that enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System so that the Subject can become the effective one (i.e., the "Effective Principles" or the "EP")? What are these Effective Principles not? How do the Effective Principles enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System (i.e., the "EP.Actions")? How can they possibly fail to do so? What cause the Effective Principles to effectively enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System (i.e., the "EP.UD")? What may cause them to fail (i.e., the "EP.UB")? Why does the Effective Principles effectively enable the Subject to best align with the Ultimate Driving System or best overcome the Ultimate Blocking System? Why can it possibly fail to do so? Advanced Questions: (To Study 1 Layer Deeper) What are the governing principles that best enable the Effective Principles to become the effective one (i.e., the "EP.Principles")? What is the environment that fully incorporate all the EP.Principles (i.e., the "EP.Environment")? What is the set of tools that fully incorporate all the EP.Principles (i.e., the "EP.Tools")? How can we best apply the Effective Principle System to achieve the desired effectiveness in this Subject (i.e., the "EP.Procedure")?
